question: Give the country with the fewest students.
sql: SELECT country FROM City JOIN Student ON City.city_code = Student.city_code GROUP BY country ORDER BY COUNT(Student.StuID) ASC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找拥有最少学生的国家

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，SQL查询意图是查找拥有最少学生的国家，正确使用了COUNT聚合函数、GROUP BY国家、ORDER BY升序排列并限制结果为1。
